steps.title: Identify the key similarity
steps.content: The passage states that A. vittata “corresponds in physiology, behavior, and ecology” to other Amazona species—establishing why the conservation approach has potential across the genus.

steps.title: Match to applicability
steps.content: Replicable means the approach can be reproduced or repeated, capturing the passage's implication that a successful method, given species similarities, applies elsewhere. The other three address understanding, observation, or restoration rather than method transfer. That matches choice A—A is correct.
